summary: Iteration 19 - Company Creation Form & Settings Testing. All features verified: 1) Commission field removed from Super Admin create company form, 2) Logo upload section added to create company form, 3) Logo upload API works POST /api/saas/companies/{id}/logo, 4) Delete company button works DELETE /api/saas/companies/{id}, 5) Company Admin can modify name/logo/phone/address via /company/profile-settings, 6) Company Admin cannot modify login email/password (no such fields exposed).

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 passed, 1 failed due to rate limiting 429)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test companies during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 features fully verified. Super Admin company creation form no longer has Commission field and now has Logo upload section. Delete company works (soft delete). Company Admin can modify profile settings (name, logo, phone, address) at /company/profile-settings route. Company Admin cannot modify login credentials (no password change or login email fields exposed). Note: /company/settings is a DIFFERENT route for general company configuration (timezone, currency, sales settings), while /company/profile-settings is for company branding (logo, name, phone, address).

commission_field_removed.details: SuperCompaniesPage.js create form does NOT include default_commission_rate field. API accepts company creation without commission field.

logo_upload_in_create_form.details: Create company modal has 'LOGO DE L'ENTREPRISE' section with file upload accepting PNG, JPG, WEBP (max 5MB)

logo_upload_api.details: Super Admin can upload logo for company. Rejects non-image files with 400.

delete_company.details: Soft deletes company, blocks all users, visible in archived companies section

company_profile_settings.details: Company Admin can modify: company_name, company_phone, company_address, company_logo. Uses PUT /api/company/profile and POST /api/company/logo/upload

company_admin_no_password_change.details: Company Admin profile settings page has NO password field. company_email is contact email only, not login credentials.

frontend_pages_tested: /super/companies - Create company form (commission removed, logo upload added)
/company/profile-settings - Company branding settings (name, logo, phone, address)
notes: Two different Company settings pages exist: /company/settings (general config) and /company/profile-settings (branding)
Company Admin email field in profile is contact email, NOT login email - modifying it does not affect login
One backend test failed due to rate limiting (429), not a real bug
